channel.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • geasstars92 - Geas is a tool that will detect the runnable official Erlang release window for your project, including its dependencies and provides many useful informations.

    • Third Party APIs

  • google-token-erlangstars1 - Google ID token verifier for Erlang.

    • Distributed Systems

  • Typhoonstars40 - Stress and load testing tool for distributed systems that simulates traffic from a test cluster toward a system-under-test (SUT) and visualizes related latencies.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Text and Numbers

  • ejsvstars6 - Erlang JSON schema validator.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Logging

  • lager_slackstars4 - Simple Slack backend for lager.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Internet of Things

  • GRiSP - Run the Erlang VM on an IoT board with many hardware interfaces and low-level drivers using a small realtime unikernel called RTEMS

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
Text and Numbers

  • miffystars2 - Jiffy wrapper which returns pretty maps.
  • rec2jsonstars42 - Generate JSON encoder/decoder from record specs.

    • Algorithms and Datastructures

  • datumstars110 - A pure functional and generic programming for Erlang

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
REST and API

  • roosterstars174 - rooster is a lightweight REST framework that runs on top of mochiweb.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2016
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • erlang-historystars495 - Hacks to add shell history to Erlang's shell.

    • Deployment

  • docker-erlangstars10 - Basic Docker Container Images for Erlang/OTP.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • Erlang and Elixir for Imperative Programmers - Introduction to Erlang and Elixir in the context of functional concepts by Wolfgang Loder (2016)

    • Build Tools

  • syncstars704 - On-the-fly recompiling for Erlang.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Nitrogenstars876 - Framework to build web applications (including front-end) in pure Erlang.

    • Web Framework Components

  • simple_bridgestars105 - An abstraction layer providing a unified interface to popular Erlang web servers (Cowboy, Inets, Mochiweb, Webmachine, and Yaws).

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • epgsqlstars337 - PostgreSQL Driver for Erlang.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Caching

  • cachestars127 - In-memory Segmented Cache

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Internet of Things

  • lemma_erlangstars7 - A lemma for IDEO's Noam internet-of-things prototyping platform.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Networking

  • gen_rpcstars218 - A scalable RPC library for Erlang-VM based languages.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Configuration Management

  • stillirstars49 - Cache environment variables as Erlang app variables.

    • Queue

  • pqueuestars151 - Erlang Priority Queues.
  • dqstars31 - Distributed Fault Tolerant Queue library.
  • ebqueuestars8 - Tiny simple blocking queue in erlang.

    • Codebase Maintenance

  • elvisstars387 - Erlang Style Reviewer.

    • Websites

  • Spawned Shelter - Erlang Spawned Shelter. A collection of the best articles, videos and presentations related to Erlang.
  • Erlang Bookmarks - All about erlang programming language [powerd by community].

    • Text and Numbers

  • eqlstars104 - Erlang with SQL or not.
  • jsxstars645 - An erlang application for consuming, producing and manipulating json.

    • Erlang Reading

  • The Joy of Erlang; Or, How To Ride A Toruk - The Joy of Erlang; Or, How To Ride A Toruk A fast track introduction to Erlang that teaches the language by walking through a few example projects.

    • Build Tools

  • rebar3stars1.3k - A build tool for Erlang which can manage Erlang packages from Hex.pm. See more at rebar3.org

    • Web Frameworks

  • cowboystars6.3k - A simple HTTP server.
  • Giallostars66 - A small and flexible web framework on top of Cowboystars6.3k.
  • N2Ostars1.3k - WebSocket Application Server.

    • HTTP

  • bulletstars305 - Simple, reliable, efficient streaming for Cowboy.
  • gunstars730 - Erlang HTTP client with support for HTTP/1.1, SPDY and Websocket.
  • hackneystars1.1k - Simple HTTP client in Erlang.
  • ibrowsestars517 - Erlang HTTP client.
  • shotgunstars158 - For the times you need more than just a gun.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • boss_dbstars264 - A sharded, caching, pooling, evented ORM for Erlang.

    • Package Management

  • hex.pm - A package manager for the Erlang ecosystem.

    • Networking

  • gossiperlstars38 - Language agnostic gossip middleware and message bus written in Erlang.
  • barrel_tcpstars84 - barrel_tcp is a generic TCP acceptor pool with low latency in Erlang.
  • nat_upnpstars41 - Erlang library to map your internal port to an external using UNP IGD.
  • ranchstars1k - Socket acceptor pool for TCP protocols.

    • Code Analysis

  • Concuerrorstars278 - Concuerror is a systematic testing tool for concurrent Erlang programs.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Date and Time

  • erlang_localtimestars50 - Erlang library for conversion from one local time to another.
  • qdatestars221 - Erlang date, time, and timezone management: formatting, conversion, and date arithmetic.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • erldstars194 - erld is a small program designed to solve the problem of running Erlang programs as a UNIX daemon.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2015
item.description:
Text and Numbers

  • qspstars18 - Enhanced query string parser for Erlang.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • pgsql_migrationstars17 – PostgreSQL migrations for Erlang.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2015
item.description:
Networking

  • gen_tcp_serverstars9 - A library that takes the concept of gen_server and introduces the same mechanics for operating a TCP server.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2015
item.description:
Testing

  • tracerlstars17 - Dynamic tracing tests and utilities for Erlang/OTP

    • Books

  • Stuff Goes Bad - ERLANG IN ANGER - This book intends to be a little guide about how to be the Erlang medic in a time of war.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Feb 23rd - Mar 1st, 2015
item.description:
ORM and Datamapping

  • mysql-otpstars326 - MySQL/OTP – MySQL driver for Erlang/OTP.

    • Text and Numbers

  • jiffystars805 - JSON NIFs for Erlang.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jan 12th - Jan 18th, 2015
item.description:
Websites

  • Planet Erlang - Planet site/RSS feed of blog posts covering topics across the Erlang ecosystem.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Oct 20th - Oct 26th, 2014
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Zotonicstars669 - High speed, real-time web framework and content management system.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Sep 22nd - Sep 28th, 2014
item.description:
Debugging

  • txstars81 - An HTML Erlang term viewer, starts own webserver and displays any term you give it from your Erlang node.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Aug 25th - Aug 31st, 2014
item.description:
Websites

  • Erlang Central - An awesome collections of erlang resource along with live community chat for discussing and seeking help.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Aug 11th - Aug 17th, 2014
item.description:
Geolocation

  • erl-rstarstars54 - An Erlang implementation of the R*-tree spacial data structure.
  • GeoCouchstars494 - A spatial extension for Couchbase and Apache CouchDB.
  • Telesstars14 - An Erlang network service for manipulating geographic data.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jul 21st - Jul 27th, 2014
item.description:
Logging

  • lager_amqp_backendstars33 - AMQP RabbitMQ Lager backend.
  • lager_smtpstars13 - SMTP backend for lager.
  • logplexstars981 - Heroku log router.

    • Algorithms and Datastructures

  • riak_dtstars314 - Erlang library of state based CRDTs.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jul 14th - Jul 20th, 2014
item.description:
Monitoring

  • statsderlstars99 - A statsd Erlang client.
  • vmstatsstars245 - Tiny Erlang app that works in conjunction with statsderl in order to generate information on the Erlang VM for graphite logs.
  • entopstars273 - A top-like Erlang node monitoring tool.
  • eperstars441 - A loose collection of Erlang Performance related tools.
  • Exometerstars510 - An Erlang instrumentation package.
  • folsomstars585 - An Erlang based metrics system inspired by Coda Hale's metricsstars447.

    • Web Frameworks

  • MochiWebstars1.8k - An Erlang library for building lightweight HTTP servers.

    • Web Framework Components

  • cb_websocket_controllerstars7 - A template for implementing a Websocket controller for ChicagoBoss.
  • giallo_sessionstars10 - A session management library for the Giallo web framework.

item.title: drobakowski/awesome-erlang Jul 7th - Jul 13th, 2014
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • ChicagoBossstars1.8k - A server framework inspired by Rails and written in Erlang.
  • Axiomstars262 - A micro-framework, inspired by Ruby's Sinatrastars11.3k.

    • HTTP

  • lhttpcstars124 - A lightweight HTTP/1.1 client implemented in Erlang.

    • Testing

  • PropErstars807 - A QuickCheck-inspired property-based testing tool for Erlang.

    • Logging

  • lagerstars36 - A logging framework for Erlang/OTP.
  • lager_hipchatstars6 - HipChat backend for lager.
  • lager_logglystars16 - Loggly backend for lager.

    • Code Analysis

  • eflamestars370 - A Flame Graph profiler for Erlang.

    • Queue

  • tinymqstars116 - A diminutive, in-memory message queue for Erlang.

    • Authentication

  • oauth2stars210 - Erlang Oauth2 implementation.

    • REST and API

  • leptusstars352 - Leptus is an Erlang REST framework that runs on top of cowboy.

    • Third Party APIs

  • restcstars81 - An Erlang REST client
  • oauth2cstars66 - An Erlang oAuth 2 client (uses restc)

    • Books

  • Learn You Some Erlang - Learn you some Erlang - for great good! A very thorough resource covering everything from beginning Erlang programming to large-scale development and deployment.

    • Web Framework Components

  • cb_adminstars68 - An admin interface for Chicago Boss.

    • Release Management

  • relxstars630 - A release assembler for Erlang.

    • Build Tools

  • rebarstars944 - Erlang build tool that makes it easy to compile and test Erlang applications, port drivers and releases.

    • Algorithms and Datastructures

  • erlandostars2 - A set of syntax extensions like currying and monads for Erlang.
  • stateboxstars241 - Erlang state "monad" with merge/conflict-resolution capabilities.

    • Actors

  • poolboystars1.4k - A hunky Erlang worker pool factory.
